{"slots":{"0":{"name":"screen","type":{"events":[],"methods":[]}},"1":{"name":"databank","type":{"events":[],"methods":[]}},"2":{"name":"core","type":{"events":[],"methods":[]}},"3":{"name":"receiver","type":{"events":[],"methods":[]}},"4":{"name":"emitter","type":{"events":[],"methods":[]}},"-1":{"name":"unit","type":{"events":[],"methods":[]}},"-2":{"name":"construct","type":{"events":[],"methods":[]}},"-3":{"name":"player","type":{"events":[],"methods":[]}},"-4":{"name":"system","type":{"events":[],"methods":[]}},"-5":{"name":"library","type":{"events":[],"methods":[]}}},"handlers":[{"code":"--library.onStart()\nfunction FormatDist(m)\n  if not m then return \"---\" end\n  if m >= 2e7  then return string.format(\"%.2f su\", m/200000)\n  elseif m >= 1e6  then return string.format(\"%.1f Mm\", m/1e6)\n  elseif m >= 1000 then return string.format(\"%.1f km\", m/1000)\n  else return string.format(\"%.0f m\", m) end\nend\n\nfunction ParsePos(s)\n  if not s or s==\"\" then return nil end\n  local w,b,x,y,z = s:match(\"::pos{(%d+),(%d+),([-%.%d]+),([-%.%d]+),([-%.%d]+)}\")\n  if x then return {w=tonumber(w),b=tonumber(b),x=tonumber(x),y=tonumber(y),z=tonumber(z)} end\n  return nil\nend\n\nfunction CalcDist(p1, p2)\n  if not p1 or not p2 then return nil end\n  local dx,dy,dz = p1.x-p2.x, p1.y-p2.y, p1.z-p2.z\n  return math.sqrt(dx*dx+dy*dy+dz*dz)\nend\n\nfunction Trim(s) return (s or \"\"):match(\"^%s*(.-)%s*$\") end\n\nfunction SetStatus(msg, dur)\n  StatusMsg    = msg\n  StatusExpiry = os.clock() + (dur or 5)\n  system.print(\"[NAV] \" .. msg)\nend\n--","filter":{"args":[],"signature":"onStart()","slotKey":"-5"},"key":"0"},{"code":"--unit.onStart()\nlocal VERSION = \"v1.2.0\"\nBaseChannel  = \"NavBase\" --export: Channel for your personal base station\nOrgChannel   = \"NavOrg\"  --export: Channel for the org-wide base station\n\nWaypointList = {}\nRoutePoints  = {}\nNavTarget    = nil\nShipID       = \"\"   -- auto-detected from construct on start\nSelectedWP   = \"\"\nSelectedRP   = \"\"\nScrollWP     = 0\nScrollRP     = 0\nStatusMsg    = \"\"\nStatusExpiry = 0\nCurrentPos   = nil\nSyncReceived = 0\nSyncTotal    = 0\n\n-- ── Data helpers ──────────────────────────────────────────────\nfunction BuildShipID()\n  local name = construct and construct.getName() or \"Ship\"\n  local cid  = construct and tostring(construct.getId()) or \"\"\n  if cid~=\"\" then return name..\"#\"..cid:sub(-6) end\n  return name\nend\n\nfunction LoadData()\n  if not databank then WaypointList={} return end\n  local raw = databank.getStringValue(\"waypoints\")\n  WaypointList = (raw~=nil and raw~=\"\") and json.decode(raw) or {}\n  local rraw = databank.getStringValue(\"routes\")\n  RoutePoints = (rraw~=nil and rraw~=\"\") and json.decode(rraw) or {}\n  local nav = databank.getStringValue(\"nav_target\")\n  NavTarget = (nav~=nil and nav~=\"\") and json.decode(nav) or nil\n  ShipID = BuildShipID()\nend\n\nfunction SaveData()\n  if not databank then return end\n  databank.setStringValue(\"waypoints\", json.encode(WaypointList))\n  databank.setStringValue(\"routes\", json.encode(RoutePoints))\n  databank.setStringValue(\"nav_target\", NavTarget and json.encode(NavTarget) or \"\")\nend\n\nfunction AddWP(name, posStr)\n  for _,wp in ipairs(WaypointList) do\n    if wp.n:lower()==name:lower() then\n      SetStatus(\"'\"..name..\"' already exists. Delete first.\")\n      return false\n    end\n  end\n  table.insert(WaypointList, {n=name, c=posStr})\n  table.sort(WaypointList, function(a,b) return a.n:lower()<b.n:lower() end)\n  SaveData()\n  SetStatus(\"Saved waypoint: \"..name)\n  return true\nend\n\nfunction DelWP(name)\n  for i,wp in ipairs(WaypointList) do\n    if wp.n:lower()==name:lower() then\n      table.remove(WaypointList, i)\n      if SelectedWP==wp.n then SelectedWP=\"\" end\n      if NavTarget and NavTarget.n:lower()==name:lower() and NavTarget.t==\"wp\" then\n        NavTarget=nil\n      end\n      SaveData()\n      SetStatus(\"Deleted: \"..name)\n      return true\n    end\n  end\n  SetStatus(\"Waypoint not found: \"..name)\n  return false\nend\n\nfunction AddRoute(name, posStr)\n  for i,rp in ipairs(RoutePoints) do\n    if rp.n:lower()==name:lower() then\n      RoutePoints[i].c = posStr\n      SaveData()\n      SetStatus(\"Route updated: \"..name)\n      return true\n    end\n  end\n  table.insert(RoutePoints, {n=name, c=posStr})\n  table.sort(RoutePoints, function(a,b) return a.n:lower()<b.n:lower() end)\n  SaveData()\n  SetStatus(\"Route saved: \"..name)\n  return true\nend\n\nfunction DelRoute(name)\n  for i,rp in ipairs(RoutePoints) do\n    if rp.n:lower()==name:lower() then\n      table.remove(RoutePoints, i)\n      if SelectedRP==rp.n then SelectedRP=\"\" end\n      if NavTarget and NavTarget.t==\"route\" and NavTarget.n:lower()==name:lower() then\n        NavTarget=nil\n      end\n      SaveData()\n      SetStatus(\"Route deleted: \"..name)\n      return true\n    end\n  end\n  SetStatus(\"Route not found: \"..name)\n  return false\nend\n\nfunction GetCurrentPos()\n  if core then\n    local p = core.getConstructWorldPos()\n    if p then return {x=p[1], y=p[2], z=p[3]} end\n  end\n  return nil\nend\n\nfunction GetCurrentPosStr()\n  local p = GetCurrentPos()\n  if not p then return nil end\n  return string.format(\"::pos{0,0,%.4f,%.4f,%.4f}\", p.x, p.y, p.z)\nend\n\nfunction UpdateWaypoint()\n  if NavTarget and NavTarget.c then\n    system.setWaypoint(NavTarget.c)\n  else\n    system.setWaypoint(\"\")\n  end\nend\n\nfunction SetNav(name, listType)\n  if listType~=\"route\" then\n    for _,wp in ipairs(WaypointList) do\n      if wp.n:lower()==name:lower() then\n        NavTarget={n=wp.n, c=wp.c, t=\"wp\"}\n        SaveData(); UpdateWaypoint(); SetStatus(\"Navigating to: \"..wp.n)\n        return true\n      end\n    end\n  end\n  if listType~=\"wp\" then\n    for _,rp in ipairs(RoutePoints) do\n      if rp.n:lower()==name:lower() then\n        NavTarget={n=rp.n, c=rp.c, t=\"route\"}\n        SaveData(); UpdateWaypoint(); SetStatus(\"Route nav: \"..rp.n)\n        return true\n      end\n    end\n  end\n  if listType then SetStatus(\"Not found: \"..name) end\n  return false\nend\n\nfunction GetNavInfo()\n  if not NavTarget then return nil end\n  local tp   = ParsePos(NavTarget.c)\n  local cp   = GetCurrentPos()\n  local dist = nil\n  if cp and tp then dist = CalcDist(cp, tp) end\n  return {name=NavTarget.n, dist=dist, coords=NavTarget.c, t=NavTarget.t or \"wp\"}\nend\n\nfunction RequestSync(target)\n  if not emitter then SetStatus(\"No emitter connected!\") return end\n  local ch = (target==\"org\") and OrgChannel or BaseChannel\n  emitter.send(ch, \"<RequestSync>\"..ShipID)\n  SetStatus(\"Sync requested from \"..(target==\"org\" and \"org base\" or \"base\"))\nend\n\nfunction PushToBase()\n  if not emitter then SetStatus(\"No emitter connected!\") return end\n  local n = 0\n  for _,wp in ipairs(WaypointList) do\n    local d = json.encode({n=wp.n, c=wp.c}):gsub('\"',\"@@@\")\n    emitter.send(BaseChannel, \"<PushWP>\"..d)\n    n = n+1\n  end\n  SetStatus(\"Pushed \"..n..\" waypoints to base\")\nend\n\n-- Auto-generate a unique name like \"WP-1\", \"WP-2\", etc.\nfunction AutoName(prefix, list)\n  local n = 1\n  while true do\n    local candidate = prefix..\"-\"..n\n    local taken = false\n    for _,item in ipairs(list) do\n      if item.n:lower()==candidate:lower() then taken=true; break end\n    end\n    if not taken then return candidate end\n    n = n+1\n  end\nend\n\nfunction MarkCurrentWP()\n  local p = GetCurrentPosStr()\n  if not p then SetStatus(\"No position — is core connected?\") return end\n  local name = AutoName(\"WP\", WaypointList)\n  AddWP(name, p)\nend\n\nfunction MarkCurrentRoute()\n  local p = GetCurrentPosStr()\n  if not p then SetStatus(\"No position — is core connected?\") return end\n  local name = AutoName(\"RT\", RoutePoints)\n  AddRoute(name, p)\nend\n\n-- ── Screen builder ────────────────────────────────────────────\nfunction DrawScreen()\n  if not screen then return end\n  screen.setRenderScript(BuildScreenScript())\nend\n\nfunction BuildScreenScript()\n  local ni     = GetNavInfo()\n  local nName  = ni and ni.name   or \"\"\n  local nDist  = ni and FormatDist(ni.dist) or \"\"\n  local nCoord = ni and ni.coords or \"\"\n  local nType  = ni and ni.t      or \"\"\n  local wpEnc  = json.encode(WaypointList):gsub('\"',\"@@@\")\n  local rpEnc  = json.encode(RoutePoints):gsub('\"',\"@@@\")\n\n  local S = {}\n\n  -- Part 1 : embedded data\n  S[1] = string.format([[\nlocal json=require('dkjson')\nlocal Cell=32\nlocal ScrW,ScrH=1024,576\nlocal ScrollWP=%d\nlocal ScrollRP=%d\nlocal SelWP=%q\nlocal SelRP=%q\nlocal nName=%q\nlocal nDist=%q\nlocal nCoord=%q\nlocal nType=%q\nlocal StatusMsg=%q\nlocal _w=%q\nlocal _r=%q\nlocal WP=json.decode(_w:gsub(\"@@@\",'\"')) or {}\nlocal RP=json.decode(_r:gsub(\"@@@\",'\"')) or {}\n]],\n    ScrollWP, ScrollRP,\n    SelectedWP, SelectedRP,\n    nName, nDist, nCoord, nType,\n    StatusMsg, wpEnc, rpEnc\n  )\n\n  -- Part 2 : layers, fonts, defaults\n  S[2] = [[\nlocal Lbg  = createLayer()\nlocal Lpnl = createLayer()\nlocal Lln  = createLayer()\nlocal Lbtn = createLayer()\nlocal Lsel = createLayer()\nlocal Ltxt = createLayer()\nlocal Ltit = createLayer()\nlocal Lhdr = createLayer()\nlocal Lst  = createLayer()\n\nlocal cx,cy = getCursor()\nlocal pr    = getCursorPressed()\nlocal Out   = \"\"\n\nlocal fTxt  = loadFont(\"Montserrat-Light\", 18)\nlocal fTit  = loadFont(\"Montserrat-Light\", 22)\nlocal fSm   = loadFont(\"Montserrat-Light\", 13)\nlocal fHdr  = loadFont(\"Montserrat-Light\", 20)\n\nsetDefaultFillColor(Ltxt, Shape_Text, 0.82,0.82,0.82,1)\nsetDefaultFillColor(Ltit, Shape_Text, 1.0, 0.86,0.0, 1)\nsetDefaultFillColor(Lhdr, Shape_Text, 0.70,0.85,1.0, 1)\nsetDefaultFillColor(Lsel, Shape_Text, 0.0, 0.87,1.0, 1)\nsetDefaultFillColor(Lst,  Shape_Text, 1.0, 0.78,0.2, 1)\nsetDefaultStrokeColor(Lln, Shape_Line, 0.15,0.32,0.62,0.7)\nsetDefaultStrokeWidth(Lln, Shape_Line, 1)\nsetDefaultFillColor(Lbtn,  Shape_BoxRounded, 0.0, 0.16,0.55,0.9)\nsetDefaultStrokeColor(Lbtn,Shape_BoxRounded, 0.32,0.50,0.87,1.0)\nsetDefaultStrokeWidth(Lbtn,Shape_BoxRounded, 1)\n\nsetNextFillColor(Lbg, 0,0.008,0.04,1)\naddBox(Lbg, 0,0,ScrW,ScrH)\n\n-- panel x/w constants\nlocal wpX,wpW   = 0,       Cell*14   -- 0..448   waypoints\nlocal rpX,rpW   = Cell*14, Cell*7    -- 448..672  routes\nlocal navX,navW = Cell*21, Cell*11   -- 672..1024 navigation\n\n-- helper: draw panel header background\nlocal function PanelHdr(x,w,r,g,b)\n  setNextFillColor(Lpnl,r,g,b,0.92)\n  setNextStrokeColor(Lpnl,r+0.1,g+0.1,b+0.1,0.3)\n  setNextStrokeWidth(Lpnl,1)\n  addBox(Lpnl,x,Cell,w,Cell)\nend\n\n-- helper: draw enabled/disabled/hover button, return true if clicked\nlocal function Btn(txt,x,y,w,h,enabled)\n  local hov = (cx>=x and cx<x+w and cy>=y and cy<y+h)\n  if not enabled then\n    setNextFillColor(Lbtn,0.07,0.07,0.15,0.6)\n    setNextStrokeColor(Lbtn,0.20,0.20,0.30,0.5)\n    addBoxRounded(Lbtn,x,y,w,h,4)\n    setNextFillColor(Ltxt,0.30,0.30,0.40,1)\n    setNextTextAlign(Ltxt,AlignH_Center,AlignV_Middle)\n    addText(Ltxt,fTxt,txt,x+w/2,y+h/2)\n    return false\n  elseif hov then\n    setNextFillColor(Lbtn,0.0,0.31,0.78,1)\n    setNextStrokeColor(Lbtn,0.4,0.63,1.0,1)\n    addBoxRounded(Lbtn,x,y,w,h,4)\n    setNextTextAlign(Ltxt,AlignH_Center,AlignV_Middle)\n    addText(Ltxt,fTxt,txt,x+w/2,y+h/2)\n  else\n    addBoxRounded(Lbtn,x,y,w,h,4)\n    setNextTextAlign(Ltxt,AlignH_Center,AlignV_Middle)\n    addText(Ltxt,fTxt,txt,x+w/2,y+h/2)\n  end\n  return hov and pr\nend\n]]\n\n  -- Part 3 : header bar\n  S[3] = [[\n-- ── HEADER ──────────────────────────────────────────────\nsetNextFillColor(Lpnl, 0,0.04,0.16,1)\nsetNextStrokeColor(Lpnl,0.15,0.32,0.62,0.8)\nsetNextStrokeWidth(Lpnl,1)\naddBox(Lpnl,0,0,ScrW,Cell)\n\nsetNextTextAlign(Ltit,AlignH_Left,AlignV_Middle)\naddText(Ltit,fTit,\"◄ NAVIGATOR v1.2 ►\",8,Cell/2)\n\nif nName~=\"\" then\n  local lbl=(nType==\"route\" and \"ROUTE ▶ \" or \"WP ▶ \")..nName\n  setNextTextAlign(Lhdr,AlignH_Center,AlignV_Middle)\n  addText(Lhdr,fHdr,lbl,ScrW/2,Cell/2)\n  setNextTextAlign(Lhdr,AlignH_Right,AlignV_Middle)\n  addText(Lhdr,fHdr,nDist,ScrW-8,Cell/2)\nelse\n  setNextFillColor(Ltxt,0.4,0.4,0.5,1)\n  setNextTextAlign(Ltxt,AlignH_Center,AlignV_Middle)\n  addText(Ltxt,fTxt,\"No navigation target  —  select an item then click Navigate\",ScrW/2,Cell/2)\nend\naddLine(Lln,0,Cell,ScrW,Cell)\n]]\n\n  -- Part 4 : waypoints panel\n  S[4] = [[\n-- ── WAYPOINTS PANEL ─────────────────────────────────────\nPanelHdr(wpX,wpW, 0,0.04,0.14)\nsetNextTextAlign(Ltit,AlignH_Center,AlignV_Middle)\naddText(Ltit,fHdr,\"WAYPOINTS  [\"..#WP..\"]\",wpX+wpW/2,Cell+Cell/2)\naddLine(Lln,wpX,Cell*2,wpX+wpW,Cell*2)\naddLine(Lln,wpX+wpW,Cell,wpX+wpW,ScrH-Cell)\n\nlocal visWP   = 14\nlocal maxSWP  = math.max(0,#WP-visWP)\nlocal sCWP    = math.max(0,math.min(ScrollWP,maxSWP))\n\nfor i=1,visWP do\n  local idx = i+sCWP\n  if idx>#WP then break end\n  local wp  = WP[idx]\n  local ry  = Cell*2+(i-1)*Cell\n  local sel = (wp.n==SelWP)\n  local hov = (cx>=wpX and cx<wpX+wpW and cy>=ry and cy<ry+Cell)\n\n  if sel then\n    setNextFillColor(Lpnl,0.0,0.59,0.86,0.22)\n    setNextStrokeColor(Lpnl,0.0,0.78,1.0,0.9)\n    setNextStrokeWidth(Lpnl,1)\n    addBox(Lpnl,wpX,ry,wpW,Cell)\n  elseif hov then\n    setNextFillColor(Lpnl,1,1,1,0.04)\n    addBox(Lpnl,wpX,ry,wpW,Cell)\n  end\n\n  setNextFillColor(Ltxt,0.30,0.35,0.50,1)\n  setNextTextAlign(Ltxt,AlignH_Right,AlignV_Middle)\n  addText(Ltxt,fSm,idx..\".\",wpX+Cell,ry+Cell/2)\n\n  local L = (sel or hov) and Lsel or Ltxt\n  if sel then setNextFillColor(Lsel,0.0,0.87,1.0,1) end\n  setNextTextAlign(L,AlignH_Left,AlignV_Middle)\n  addText(L,fTxt,wp.n,wpX+Cell+6,ry+Cell/2)\n\n  setNextStrokeColor(Lln,0.15,0.32,0.62,0.25)\n  addLine(Lln,wpX,ry+Cell,wpX+wpW,ry+Cell)\n\n  if hov and pr then Out=json.encode({\"sel_wp\",wp.n}) end\nend\n\nif #WP>visWP then\n  local sbX  = wpX+wpW-6\n  local sbYs = Cell*2+2\n  local sbH  = visWP*Cell-4\n  local tH   = math.max(16,sbH*(visWP/#WP))\n  local tY   = sbYs+(sbH-tH)*(sCWP/math.max(1,maxSWP))\n  setNextFillColor(Lln,0.1,0.22,0.44,0.5)\n  addBox(Lln,sbX,sbYs,5,sbH)\n  setNextFillColor(Lln,0.0,0.63,1.0,0.8)\n  addBox(Lln,sbX,tY,5,tH)\nend\n]]\n\n  -- Part 5 : route points panel\n  S[5] = [[\n-- ── ROUTE POINTS PANEL ──────────────────────────────────\nPanelHdr(rpX,rpW, 0,0.08,0.06)\nsetNextTextAlign(Ltit,AlignH_Center,AlignV_Middle)\nsetNextFillColor(Ltit,0.0,0.86,0.47,1)\naddText(Ltit,fHdr,\"ROUTES  [\"..#RP..\"]\",rpX+rpW/2,Cell+Cell/2)\naddLine(Lln,rpX,Cell*2,rpX+rpW,Cell*2)\naddLine(Lln,rpX+rpW,Cell,rpX+rpW,ScrH-Cell)\n\nlocal visRP  = 14\nlocal maxSRP = math.max(0,#RP-visRP)\nlocal sCRP   = math.max(0,math.min(ScrollRP,maxSRP))\n\nfor i=1,visRP do\n  local idx = i+sCRP\n  if idx>#RP then break end\n  local rp  = RP[idx]\n  local ry  = Cell*2+(i-1)*Cell\n  local sel = (rp.n==SelRP)\n  local hov = (cx>=rpX and cx<rpX+rpW and cy>=ry and cy<ry+Cell)\n\n  if sel then\n    setNextFillColor(Lpnl,0.0,0.55,0.27,0.22)\n    setNextStrokeColor(Lpnl,0.0,0.86,0.47,0.9)\n    setNextStrokeWidth(Lpnl,1)\n    addBox(Lpnl,rpX,ry,rpW,Cell)\n  elseif hov then\n    setNextFillColor(Lpnl,1,1,1,0.04)\n    addBox(Lpnl,rpX,ry,rpW,Cell)\n  end\n\n  local L = (sel or hov) and Lsel or Ltxt\n  if sel then setNextFillColor(Lsel,0.0,0.86,0.47,1) end\n  setNextTextAlign(L,AlignH_Left,AlignV_Middle)\n  addText(L,fTxt,rp.n,rpX+8,ry+Cell/2)\n\n  setNextStrokeColor(Lln,0.15,0.32,0.62,0.25)\n  addLine(Lln,rpX,ry+Cell,rpX+rpW,ry+Cell)\n\n  if hov and pr then Out=json.encode({\"sel_rp\",rp.n}) end\nend\n\nif #RP>visRP then\n  local sbX  = rpX+rpW-6\n  local sbYs = Cell*2+2\n  local sbH  = visRP*Cell-4\n  local tH   = math.max(16,sbH*(visRP/#RP))\n  local tY   = sbYs+(sbH-tH)*(sCRP/math.max(1,maxSRP))\n  setNextFillColor(Lln,0.05,0.24,0.12,0.5)\n  addBox(Lln,sbX,sbYs,5,sbH)\n  setNextFillColor(Lln,0.0,0.78,0.42,0.8)\n  addBox(Lln,sbX,tY,5,tH)\nend\n]]\n\n  -- Part 6 : navigation panel + buttons\n  S[6] = [[\n-- ── NAVIGATION PANEL ────────────────────────────────────\nPanelHdr(navX,navW, 0.04,0,0.10)\nsetNextTextAlign(Ltit,AlignH_Center,AlignV_Middle)\nsetNextFillColor(Ltit,0.70,0.47,1.0,1)\naddText(Ltit,fHdr,\"NAVIGATION\",navX+navW/2,Cell+Cell/2)\naddLine(Lln,navX,Cell*2,navX+navW,Cell*2)\n\nlocal nr = Cell*2+10\nlocal function NRow(lbl,val,y)\n  setNextFillColor(Ltxt,0.47,0.47,0.65,1)\n  setNextTextAlign(Ltxt,AlignH_Left,AlignV_Top)\n  addText(Ltxt,fSm,lbl,navX+8,y)\n  setNextFillColor(Ltxt,0.82,0.82,0.82,1)\n  setNextTextAlign(Ltxt,AlignH_Left,AlignV_Top)\n  addText(Ltxt,fTxt,val,navX+8,y+15)\n  return y+Cell+4\nend\n\nif nName~=\"\" then\n  nr = NRow(\"TARGET \"..(nType==\"route\" and \"[ROUTE]\" or \"[WP]\"), nName, nr)\n  nr = NRow(\"DISTANCE\", nDist, nr)\n  setNextFillColor(Ltxt,0.47,0.47,0.65,1)\n  setNextTextAlign(Ltxt,AlignH_Left,AlignV_Top)\n  addText(Ltxt,fSm,\"COORDINATES\",navX+8,nr)\n  nr=nr+15\n  local c1=nCoord:sub(1,30)\n  local c2=nCoord:sub(31)\n  setNextFillColor(Ltxt,0.70,0.70,0.70,1)\n  setNextTextAlign(Ltxt,AlignH_Left,AlignV_Top)\n  addText(Ltxt,fSm,c1,navX+8,nr); nr=nr+14\n  if c2~=\"\" then\n    setNextFillColor(Ltxt,0.70,0.70,0.70,1)\n    setNextTextAlign(Ltxt,AlignH_Left,AlignV_Top)\n    addText(Ltxt,fSm,c2,navX+8,nr)\n  end\nelse\n  setNextFillColor(Ltxt,0.35,0.35,0.50,1)\n  setNextTextAlign(Ltxt,AlignH_Center,AlignV_Middle)\n  addText(Ltxt,fTxt,\"No target set\",navX+navW/2,Cell*4)\n  setNextFillColor(Ltxt,0.25,0.25,0.40,1)\n  setNextTextAlign(Ltxt,AlignH_Center,AlignV_Middle)\n  addText(Ltxt,fSm,\"Click a list item, then\",navX+navW/2,Cell*5)\n  setNextFillColor(Ltxt,0.25,0.25,0.40,1)\n  setNextTextAlign(Ltxt,AlignH_Center,AlignV_Middle)\n  addText(Ltxt,fSm,\"press Navigate below\",navX+navW/2,Cell*5+16)\nend\n\n-- Buttons (7 stacked, bottom of nav panel)\nlocal bX   = navX+6\nlocal bW   = navW-12\nlocal bH   = Cell-6\nlocal bGap = 4\nlocal bY   = ScrH-Cell-(bH+bGap)*7\n\nif Btn(\"★  MARK WAYPOINT HERE\", bX,bY,bW,bH, true)       then Out=json.encode({\"mark_wp\"})            end; bY=bY+bH+bGap\nif Btn(\"★  MARK ROUTE PT HERE\", bX,bY,bW,bH, true)       then Out=json.encode({\"mark_route\"})         end; bY=bY+bH+bGap\nif Btn(\"▶  NAVIGATE TO WP\",    bX,bY,bW,bH, SelWP~=\"\")  then Out=json.encode({\"goto\",SelWP,\"wp\"})    end; bY=bY+bH+bGap\nif Btn(\"▶  NAVIGATE TO ROUTE\", bX,bY,bW,bH, SelRP~=\"\")  then Out=json.encode({\"goto\",SelRP,\"route\"}) end; bY=bY+bH+bGap\nif Btn(\"✕  CLEAR NAVIGATION\",  bX,bY,bW,bH, nName~=\"\")  then Out=json.encode({\"clear_nav\"})          end; bY=bY+bH+bGap\nif Btn(\"⟳  SYNC FROM BASE\",    bX,bY,bW,bH, true)       then Out=json.encode({\"sync\",\"base\"})         end; bY=bY+bH+bGap\nif Btn(\"⟳  SYNC FROM ORG\",     bX,bY,bW,bH, true)       then Out=json.encode({\"sync\",\"org\"})          end\n]]\n\n  -- Part 7 : footer + output\n  S[7] = [[\n-- ── FOOTER ──────────────────────────────────────────────\naddLine(Lln,0,ScrH-Cell,ScrW,ScrH-Cell)\nsetNextFillColor(Lpnl,0,0.02,0.08,0.95)\naddBox(Lpnl,0,ScrH-Cell,ScrW,Cell)\n\nif StatusMsg~=\"\" then\n  setNextTextAlign(Lst,AlignH_Center,AlignV_Middle)\n  addText(Lst,fTxt,StatusMsg,ScrW/2,ScrH-Cell/2)\nelse\n  setNextFillColor(Ltxt,0.31,0.31,0.47,1)\n  setNextTextAlign(Ltxt,AlignH_Center,AlignV_Middle)\n  addText(Ltxt,fSm,\"Lua chat: help  |  Click items to select  |  Use navigation buttons\",ScrW/2,ScrH-Cell/2)\nend\n\nsetOutput(Out)\nrequestAnimationFrame(1)\n]]\n\n  return table.concat(S)\nend\n\n-- ── Initialise ────────────────────────────────────────────────\nLoadData()\nCurrentPos = GetCurrentPos()\nif screen   then screen.activate() end\nif receiver then receiver.setChannelList({BaseChannel, OrgChannel}) end\nunit.setTimer(\"nav_tick\", 1)\nUpdateWaypoint()\nsystem.print(\"=== Navigator \"..VERSION..\" ===  Ship: \"..ShipID)\nsystem.print(\"Type 'help' in Lua chat\")\nDrawScreen()\n--","filter":{"args":[],"signature":"onStart()","slotKey":"-1"},"key":"1"},{"code":"--unit.onStop()\nsystem.setWaypoint(\"\")\nif screen then screen.setCenteredText(\"Navigator\") end\n--","filter":{"args":[],"signature":"onStop()","slotKey":"-1"},"key":"2"},{"code":"--unit.onTimer(tag)\nCurrentPos = GetCurrentPos()\nif StatusMsg~=\"\" and os.clock()>StatusExpiry then StatusMsg=\"\" end\nUpdateWaypoint()\nDrawScreen()\n--","filter":{"args":[{"value":"nav_tick"}],"signature":"onTimer(tag)","slotKey":"-1"},"key":"3"},{"code":"--screen.onMouseUp(x,y)\nlocal raw = screen.getScriptOutput()\nif not raw or raw==\"\" then return end\nlocal ok,data = pcall(json.decode, raw)\nif not ok or type(data)~=\"table\" then return end\n\nlocal act,p1,p2 = data[1],data[2],data[3]\n\nif     act==\"sel_wp\"    then SelectedWP=(SelectedWP==p1 and \"\" or p1); SelectedRP=\"\"\nelseif act==\"sel_rp\"    then SelectedRP=(SelectedRP==p1 and \"\" or p1); SelectedWP=\"\"\nelseif act==\"goto\"      then SetNav(p1,p2)\nelseif act==\"clear_nav\" then NavTarget=nil; SaveData(); UpdateWaypoint(); SetStatus(\"Navigation cleared\")\nelseif act==\"sync\"      then RequestSync(p1)\nelseif act==\"mark_wp\"   then MarkCurrentWP()\nelseif act==\"mark_route\" then MarkCurrentRoute()\nend\nDrawScreen()\n--","filter":{"args":[{"variable":"*"},{"variable":"*"}],"signature":"onMouseUp(x,y)","slotKey":"0"},"key":"4"},{"code":"--receiver.onReceived(channel,message)\nif message:find(\"<SyncCount>\",1,true) then\n  SyncTotal    = tonumber(message:gsub(\"<SyncCount>\",\"\")) or 0\n  SyncReceived = 0\n  if SyncTotal==0 then SetStatus(\"Base has no waypoints\")\n  else SetStatus(\"Syncing \"..SyncTotal..\" waypoints...\") end\nend\n\nif message:find(\"<SyncWP>\",1,true) then\n  local raw = message:gsub(\"<SyncWP>\",\"\"):gsub(\"@@@\",'\"')\n  local ok,wp = pcall(json.decode, raw)\n  if ok and wp and wp.n and wp.c then\n    local found=false\n    for i,e in ipairs(WaypointList) do\n      if e.n:lower()==wp.n:lower() then WaypointList[i].c=wp.c; found=true; break end\n    end\n    if not found then table.insert(WaypointList,{n=wp.n,c=wp.c}) end\n    SyncReceived=(SyncReceived or 0)+1\n  end\nend\n\nif message:find(\"<SyncComplete>\",1,true) then\n  table.sort(WaypointList,function(a,b) return a.n:lower()<b.n:lower() end)\n  SaveData()\n  SetStatus(\"Sync complete: \"..SyncReceived..\" waypoints received\")\nend\nDrawScreen()\n--","filter":{"args":[{"variable":"*"},{"variable":"*"}],"signature":"onReceived(channel,message)","slotKey":"3"},"key":"5"},{"code":"--system.onInputText(text)\nlocal t  = Trim(text)\nlocal lo = t:lower()\n\nif lo==\"help\" then\n  system.print(\"═══════════════════════════════\")\n  system.print(\"  NAVIGATOR COMMANDS\")\n  system.print(\"═══════════════════════════════\")\n  system.print(\"add NAME            save current pos as WP\")\n  system.print(\"add NAME ::pos{..}  save coords as WP\")\n  system.print(\"del NAME            delete waypoint\")\n  system.print(\"route NAME          add current pos as route\")\n  system.print(\"route NAME ::pos{}  add coords as route\")\n  system.print(\"rdel NAME           remove route point\")\n  system.print(\"rclear              clear all routes\")\n  system.print(\"nav NAME            navigate to WP or route\")\n  system.print(\"nav off             clear navigation\")\n  system.print(\"sync                sync from personal base\")\n  system.print(\"orgsync             sync from org base\")\n  system.print(\"push                push WPs to base\")\n  system.print(\"id NAME             set ship ID\")\n  system.print(\"list                print all waypoints\")\n  system.print(\"routes              print all routes\")\n  return\nend\n\n-- add NAME [coords]\nlocal addN,addC = t:match(\"^[Aa][Dd][Dd]%s+(%S+)%s*(.*)\")\nif addN then\n  addC=Trim(addC)\n  if addC==\"\" then\n    local p=GetCurrentPosStr()\n    if p then AddWP(addN,p) else SetStatus(\"No position — is core connected?\") end\n  else\n    if ParsePos(addC) then AddWP(addN,addC)\n    else SetStatus(\"Bad coords. Use ::pos{0,0,x,y,z}\") end\n  end\n  DrawScreen(); return\nend\n\n-- del NAME\nlocal delN = t:match(\"^[Dd][Ee][Ll]%s+(.+)\")\nif delN then DelWP(Trim(delN)); DrawScreen(); return end\n\n-- route NAME [coords]\nlocal rtN,rtC = t:match(\"^[Rr][Oo][Uu][Tt][Ee]%s+(%S+)%s*(.*)\")\nif rtN then\n  rtC=Trim(rtC)\n  if rtC==\"\" then\n    local p=GetCurrentPosStr()\n    if p then AddRoute(rtN,p) else SetStatus(\"No position — is core connected?\") end\n  else\n    if ParsePos(rtC) then AddRoute(rtN,rtC)\n    else SetStatus(\"Bad coords. Use ::pos{0,0,x,y,z}\") end\n  end\n  DrawScreen(); return\nend\n\n-- rdel NAME\nlocal rdN = t:match(\"^[Rr][Dd][Ee][Ll]%s+(.+)\")\nif rdN then DelRoute(Trim(rdN)); DrawScreen(); return end\n\n-- rclear\nif lo==\"rclear\" then\n  RoutePoints={}\n  if NavTarget and NavTarget.t==\"route\" then NavTarget=nil; UpdateWaypoint() end\n  SelectedRP=\"\"\n  SaveData()\n  SetStatus(\"All routes cleared\"); DrawScreen(); return\nend\n\n-- nav NAME / nav off\nlocal navN = t:match(\"^[Nn][Aa][Vv]%s+(.+)\")\nif navN then\n  navN=Trim(navN)\n  if navN:lower()==\"off\" or navN:lower()==\"clear\" then\n    NavTarget=nil; SaveData(); UpdateWaypoint(); SetStatus(\"Navigation cleared\")\n  else SetNav(navN,nil) end\n  DrawScreen(); return\nend\n\nif lo==\"sync\"    then RequestSync(\"base\"); return end\nif lo==\"orgsync\" then RequestSync(\"org\");  return end\nif lo==\"push\"    then PushToBase();        return end\n\n-- id NAME\nlocal newID = t:match(\"^[Ii][Dd]%s+(.+)\")\nif newID then\n  ShipID=Trim(newID)\n  if databank then databank.setStringValue(\"ship_id\",ShipID) end\n  SetStatus(\"Ship ID: \"..ShipID); DrawScreen(); return\nend\n\nif lo==\"list\" then\n  system.print(\"─── WAYPOINTS (\"..#WaypointList..\") ───\")\n  for i,wp in ipairs(WaypointList) do\n    system.print(i..\".  \"..wp.n..\"  \"..wp.c)\n  end\n  return\nend\n\nif lo==\"routes\" then\n  system.print(\"─── ROUTES (\"..#RoutePoints..\") ───\")\n  for i,rp in ipairs(RoutePoints) do\n    system.print(i..\".  \"..rp.n..\"  \"..rp.c)\n  end\n  return\nend\n\nSetStatus(\"Unknown command '\"..lo..\"'  —  type 'help'\")\n--","filter":{"args":[{"variable":"*"}],"signature":"onInputText(text)","slotKey":"-4"},"key":"6"}],"methods":[],"events":[]}
